case_title: TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION VS. JARVIS ASSOCIATES, PA et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION ANSON LOUIE FILED RE: BUSINESS RECORDS (EVID CODE 1521, 1550) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT JARVIS ASSOCIATES, PA JARVIS, RALPH DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-11-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-09-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-27-2004
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION SERVED FEB-17-2004, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JARVIS ASSOCIATES, PA
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $360.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT JARVIS ASSOCIATES, PA JARVIS, RALPH
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION SERVED FEB-17-2004, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JARVIS, RALPH
DECLARATION ERNEST I. KNOWLES FILED RE: DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JARVIS ASSOCIATES, PA JARVIS, RALPH POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: ONE HIPER/LEGACY-H 5HZ RTK SYSTEM W/RANGER 200T AND PINNACLE SOFTWARE, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $22,197.57 DAMAGES, $2,550.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $360.50 COSTS, $364.80 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $25,472.87, THE EQUIPMENT HAS A FAIR MARKET VALUE OF $12,000.00 AND IS ENTITLED TO ITS IMMEDIATE POSSESSION.
DECLARATION LAUDEL VILLANUEVA FILED RE: EQUIPMENT VALUATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-11-2004, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS
